ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the crime occurred */,
  "offense" TEXT /* Type of offense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the crime location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the crime location */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the crime occurred */,
  "date_of_offense" TEXT /* Date when the crime occurred */,
  "offense_type" TEXT /* Category of the offense (violent or non-violent) */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community where the crime occurred */,
  "community_population" INTEGER /* Population of the community */,
  "incident_number" TEXT /* Unique incident number for the crime */,
  "reporting_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who reported the crime */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim (if applicable) */,
  "crime_status" TEXT /* Status of the crime (open, closed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_offense FOREIGN KEY ("offense") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_offense_type FOREIGN KEY ("offense_type") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "area_covered" TEXT /* Area that the precinct covers */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the precinct */,
  "commander_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct commander */,
  "commander_email" TEXT /* Email address of the precinct commander */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offenses" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of offense */,
  "offense_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense */,
  "offense_description" TEXT /* Description of the offense */,
  "offense_code" TEXT /* Code for the offense (e.g., TFMV for Theft from Motor Vehicle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct responsible for the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "community_name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community */,
  "community_description" TEXT /* Description of the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime associated with the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the crime report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was filed */,
  "reporting_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who filed the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime being investigated */,
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigator assigned to the case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the investigation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the investigation ended */,
  "investigation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the investigation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigator_id") REFERENCES investigators ("investigator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigators" (
  "investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigator */,
  "investigator_name" TEXT /* Name of the investigator */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the investigator is based */,
  "investigator_email" TEXT /* Email address of the investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime analysis */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the crime analyzed */,
  "analysis_details" TEXT /* Details of the analysis performed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who performed the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_analysis_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighborhood associated with the statistic */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the offense associated with the statistic */,
  "crime_count" INTEGER /* Count of crimes of the specified type in the neighborhood */,
  "statistic_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was recorded */,
  "statistic_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the user works */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "victim_email" TEXT /* Email address of the victim */,
  "victim_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)
